notes.text:
SESSION HANDOVER (2026-05-06) — Observer-reliability iterative plan, IN-FLIGHT.

CURRENT IN-FLIGHT WORK: r-c69ce245 (plan stage running in worktree). Wholesale-replace fix for forge_update_run agents handling (TODO 0e05f1ab). Plan worker truncation flag is a FALSE POSITIVE caused by data.worktreePath not propagating to SubagentStop hook — the planner DID write a clean 3-AC plan to .worktrees/r-c69ce245/docs/PLAN.md:230. Worker is alive (log at .worktrees/r-c69ce245/.pipeline/worker-logs/r-c69ce245.log, fresh mtime). Wait for gate1, approve, let it land. Use /forge:approve commit gate at the end.

OBSERVER-RELIABILITY ITERATIVE PLAN (decided this session — iterative > consolidated):

The observer card has a cluster of related bugs sharing one theme: worktree context not consistently resolved by hooks/observer/dashboard-state/forge-status. We chose iterative fixes over a consolidated mega-PR because (a) bugs share theme but different mechanisms — bundling masks which fix solved which, (b) each fix gets its own reviewer round, (c) confidence builds at each step. Same eventual end state with less risk per merge.

ORDER:
1. [DONE — wait for completion] r-c69ce245: wholesale-replace fix (foundation — stops the agent-array clobber bug). Currently in plan stage.
2. [NEXT] e8aaa655: worker logs land in wrong path for worktree-backed runs (.worktrees/<runId>/.pipeline/worker-logs/<runId>.log instead of main's .pipeline/worker-logs/<runId>.log). This is the BIGGEST visibility win — without it, every worktree-backed run looks dead in observer. Pipeline-dispatch alone after r-c69ce245 lands.
3. [OBSERVE] After e8aaa655 lands, check whether the truncation false positive (planner outcome="truncated" when worktree PLAN.md was actually written) auto-resolves. Likely shares root cause.
4. [PICK NEXT] If 3 didn't auto-resolve, fix the truncation hook (hooks/subagent-stop.js:271-282 — baseDir = data.worktreePath || projectDir). Otherwise pick whichever observer bug is most painful: d316415f (card disappears at gate2 instead of awaiting-commit), 3e7af145 (locked-vs-dispatched SPECS display misleading), e7ebd631 stage 2 (full per-phase rows).
5. [REPEAT] Until observer card is solid.

GATING: 0233f9c8 (gitignore mcp/node_modules — escalated to high after r-9192b81f spawn failure caused by 52 deleted tracked node_modules files including @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk) is independent and high priority. Worth slotting in alongside the observer work — it eliminates a recurrent merge-cascade-deletion class of incidents.

CONTEXT: per-run pipeline state (TODO 0a0ac4e8 — closed) shipped this session via r-fcedb742 + r-d5b1ccd9 + commit 1470758. CLAUDE.md discriminator fix (commit 73d67fd). Plan skill stale-reviewer-output cleanup (commit a8385d4). Dead deny envelope removed (commit 807eb62). Runtime artifacts gitignored (commit 6f0ba3d). Observer phase indicator + per-phase timer reset (commit 26162e2).

OPEN HIGH-PRIORITY TODOS at handover: d316415f (observer card disappears), 0e05f1ab (agent outcome null — being fixed by r-c69ce245), 815c3601 (acceptance verification), d498e466 (stuck-loop hard-stop), e7b6c8d1 (SPECS tab token observability), 0233f9c8 (gitignore mcp/node_modules), 08bdf2d2 (DONE — plan-stage reviewer hygiene), e8aaa655 (worker log path bug — NEXT after r-c69ce245).
